name_it: Saint Peter Chanel, priest and martyr
name_en: Saint Peter Chanel, priest and martyr
name_es: Saint Peter Chanel, priest and martyr
name_pt: Saint Peter Chanel, priest and martyr
bio_en: Peter Louis Marie Chanel, SM, was a Catholic priest, missionary, and martyr. Chanel was a member of the Society of Mary and was sent as a missionary to Oceania. He arrived on the island of Futuna in November 1837. Chanel was clubbed to death in April 1841 at the instigation of a chief upset because his son had converted.
